name: Lady Fingers # 2
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift the powdered sugar.
2. Measure and sift the cake flour carefully.
3. Gradually fold the sifted sugar into the stiffly beaten egg whites.
4. Gently mix in the beaten egg yolks, vanilla, orange flavoring, and salt until combined.
5. Sift the cake flour and fold it into the mixture.
6. Line a baking sheet with un-oiled parchment paper.
7. Shape lady fingers using a pastry bag fitted with a small round tip, making each about 4 inches long and 1 inch wide.
8. Bake in a moderate oven (375°F) for 10 minutes.
9. Remove from the oven and slide off the baking sheet onto a wire rack.
10. Arrange the lady fingers on waxed paper with the bottoms of one on top of another.
11. Cool completely before dusting with powdered sugar.
14 servings.
